data.title: RWS obtains US Patent for AI predicting translation effort during content creation. Patent No. 12,505,297, available to Trados users in 2026.
data.description: RWS, a multinational AI solutions firm based in Maidenhead, England, has recently received US Patent No. 12,505,297. This patent is for a cutting-edge AI-powered system designed to assist organizations in gauging the translational viability of their content during the authoring process. By implementing this patented technology, known as Document Translation Feasibility Analysis Systems and Methods, companies can discern the translation potential of their content before initiating any formal translation projects. This innovative system is set to be integrated into Trados services by 2026. This advancement marks a significant step forward in streamlining the translation processes for businesses and enhancing efficiency in content localization.
According to Airbus CEO, open rotor and ducted engine designs are both in competition for the next aircraft.

data.title: Coinbase CEO Armstrong dismisses quantum computing threat to blockchain security, says it's solvable. Arbord formed to assess threats. Adapting protocols.
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. CEO Brian Armstrong reassured investors about quantum computing posing a threat to blockchain encryption. In an interview, Armstrong stated that quantum computing is a resolvable issue and that Coinbase is proactively addressing it. The company is actively engaged with major blockchains to transition to post-quantum cryptography. Last month, Coinbase formed an advisory board to analyze quantum computing's impact on blockchain and mitigate future risks. The board will publish research papers, offer recommendations, and respond promptly to challenges. Armstrong emphasized Coinbase's commitment to staying ahead of potential threats, affirming its proactive stance on quantum risks.

data.title: Ledn completes $188M Bitcoin-backed loan securitization, packaging thousands of consumer loans into rated bonds. Investors gain exposure to crypto risk without holding BTC.
data.description: According to reports, a Bitcoin lending company has bundled thousands of consumer loans backed by Bitcoin into bonds with credit ratings. This move provides investors with an alternative method to invest in cryptocurrency-related risks without directly owning Bitcoin.

data.title: Vonage partners with Ericsson to boost developer ecosystem for enterprise digital transformation, expanding tools and capabilities.
data.description: In Holmdel, New Jersey, Vonage, a subsidiary of Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC), has revealed several fresh endeavors to enhance its global developer community. Through boosting tools and expanding the community, Vonage aims to provide developers and businesses access to advanced mobile network features to integrate into current applications and processes. This move aligns with Vonage's plan to revolutionize mobile networks into a programmable avenue. By incorporating Vonage APIs, the company aims to offer valuable network insights and capabilities to developers and enterprises globally.

data.title: Rudding Park partners with Agilysys for tech upgrade; Agilysys to modernize operations in luxury resort.
data.description: In London and Alpharetta, Georgia, Agilysys, Inc. (Nasdaq: AGYS), a prominent provider of hospitality technology solutions globally, has shared news today. Rudding Park, an acclaimed hotel, spa, and golf resort in Harrogate, has selected Agilysys' hospitality software solutions to facilitate a significant technology overhaul. This move is part of Rudding Park's expansion into a multi-amenity luxury hotel business. Over the span of almost 20 years, Rudding Park has transitioned from a single hotel into a complex luxury destination.

data.title: OBUSPA integrated with prpl and RDK, reducing service deployment time from months to weeks; prplWare and RDK-B involved.
data.description: A significant advancement has taken place in Fremont, California, as broadband service providers (BSPs) utilizing prpl Foundation and RDK platforms can now roll out new services much faster. Thanks to integrations with the Broadband Forum’s OBUSPA open source software, deployment time has been reduced from months to just weeks. This breakthrough impacts two popular carrier-grade open source platforms for home broadband management: prpl Foundation’s prplWare and RDK’s RDK-B software. The new integration allows for quicker service implementation and is poised to transform the broadband industry.

data.title: Kaldalón hf. to auction 6-month bills, KALD 26 0901 series, in ISK 20 million units on 24 Feb, managed by Landsbankinn hf. Payment/settlement on 2 March 2025.
data.description: Kaldalón hf. is set to conduct an auction on 24 February for a new series of six-month bills, titled KALD 26 0901 bills. The company is committed to regular issuance of bills and bonds, with the auction employing the Dutch method. Each bill will have a nominal value of ISK 20 million, and Kaldalón hf. retains the discretion to fully accept, reject, or partially accept bids. Landsbankinn hf. will oversee the auction process. Interested investors must submit bids detailing the nominal amount and flat yield to Landsbankinn hf. at verdbrefamidlun@landsbankinn.is by 16:00 on 24 February. The results and allocation of bills will be announced before the market opens on 25 February. Payment and settlement for successful bids are scheduled for 2 March 2025.

data.title: Eviden and Almaviva partner to secure deployments of Cooperative Intelligent Transport Systems in Italy.
data.description: Eviden and Almaviva have recently partnered in Italy to ensure the safe deployment of Cooperative Intelligent Transport Systems. This collaboration aims to enhance road safety and efficiency by integrating advanced technologies. With Eviden's expertise in system security and Almaviva's experience in transport systems, they plan to implement cutting-edge solutions across the country. The collaboration is set to benefit a significant number of commuters and motorists, improving overall transportation infrastructure.
